languages.text: "Хм... а это отличная идея, Ваша Светлость. Гильза сгорит сама, главное, ствол время от времени прочищать. Как будет время — проведем пару испытаний".
"Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."
languages.original_text: "Хм... а это отличная идея, Ваша Светлость. Гильза сгорит сама, главное, ствол время от времени прочищать. Как будет время — проведем пару испытаний".

languages.text: 「うーん…いい考えですね、{mf|殿|殿}。バレルを時々掃除すれば、銃身は勝手に燃え尽きます。時間があれば、テストしてみましょう」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... that's a good idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."

languages.text: "Hım... Bu harika bir fikir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Namluyu arada bir temizlediğiniz sürece kovan kendi kendine yanacaktır. Vaktimiz olduğunda bazı testler yapacağız."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."

traits.locale_text: "Hım... Bu harika bir fikir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Namluyu arada bir temizlediğiniz sürece kovan kendi kendine yanacaktır. Vaktimiz olduğunda bazı testler yapacağız."

languages.text: “嗯……真是个好主意，大人。只要偶尔清理一下枪管，弹壳就会自己烧干净。等有空了我们测试看看。”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."

traits.locale_text: “嗯……真是个好主意，大人。只要偶尔清理一下枪管，弹壳就会自己烧干净。等有空了我们测试看看。”

languages.text: "Hmm ... Eine großartige Idee, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Hülse brennt von selbst, solange man ab und an den Lauf reinigt. Das probieren wir aus, sobald wir etwas Zeit haben."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... "Eine großartige Idee, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Hülse brennt von selbst, solange man ab und an den Lauf reinigt. Das probieren wir aus, sobald wir etwas Zeit haben."

languages.text: « Hmm… C'est une excellente idée, Votre Seigneurie. Ainsi, la douille pourrait se consumer d'elle-même, il suffirait de nettoyer régulièrement le canon. Quand nous aurons le temps, nous pourrons procéder à quelques essais. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm… C'est une excellente idée, Votre Seigneurie. Ainsi, la douille pourrait se consumer d'elle-même, il suffirait de nettoyer régulièrement le canon. Quand nous aurons le temps, nous pourrons procéder à quelques essais. »

languages.text: «Mmm... Es buena idea, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Los casquillos arderán por sí mismos si se limpia el cañón de vez en cuando. Cuando tengamos tiempo, lo probaremos».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... That's a great idea, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The casing will burn on its own as long as you clean the barrel once in a while. When we have time, we'll do some tests."
